title: Switzerland Blocks Arms Sales to U.S. Over Iran War
summary_full: Swiss law prohibits selling war materiel to countries involved in armed conflict, a policy the country has already cited to block sales to Israel and Iran.
summary_public: Swiss law prohibits selling war materiel to countries involved in armed conflict, a policy the country has already cited to block sales to Israel and Iran.

IR.label: negative
